classes.admissible_opened_phase_activation: Verifier-backed activation artifacts created after formal Phase 3 opening and admissible as opened-phase activation proof.
classes.historical_planning_only: Historical planning, cleanup, remediation, or governance artifacts that remain useful context but are not opened-phase delivery proof.
classes.regenerate_required: Legacy runtime-adjacent artifacts that must be regenerated under the opened Phase 3 regime before they can be treated as admissible implementation proof.

rules.rationale: Activation task plans and execution logs are part of the opened-phase activation proof chain.
Human-readable normalization summary created by TSK-P3-ACT-005.
Machine-readable normalization manifest created by TSK-P3-ACT-005.
Human intervention remediation records remain audit context, not opened-phase delivery proof.
Cleanup task plans were created before opened-phase activation and are retained as historical planning context.
Pre-activation governance task plans are contextual but not opened-phase proof.
Pre-entry remediation plans remain historical readiness artifacts.
Legacy runtime-adjacent Wave 1 planning artifacts must be regenerated under the opened-phase task regime.
Legacy Wave 8 crossover planning artifacts must be regenerated before opened-phase use.
Verifier-backed activation evidence emitted after formal opening.
Planning-era constitutional manifest retained as context, not opened-phase proof.
Cleanup evidence predates the opened-phase activation posture and is historical only.
Governance evidence emitted before the opened-phase activation sequence remains historical.
Wave 1 implementation evidence must be regenerated under the opened-phase verifier set before use.
Legacy Wave 8 crossover evidence must be regenerated before it can support Phase 3 runtime claims.
Legacy runtime-adjacent operational status evidence is not admissible opened-phase proof without regeneration.
